title: stelis coralloides
intro: Stelis coralloides, also known as the coral stelis, is a type of orchid plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Stelis coralloides include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Stelis coralloides is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
